title: Codereview pass 2: Add test for window poisoning resistance
description:
The replay window fix lacks a regression test that specifically verifies window poisoning is prevented.

Suggested test outline:
1. Create sender_ctx and recipient_ctx with same master_secret
2. Create attacker_ctx with different master_secret but same IDs
3. attacker sends packet with seq=5 (valid seq, wrong key)
4. recipient_ctx.unprotect_request() returns DecryptFailed
5. legitimate sender sends packet with seq=5 (same seq, correct key)
6. recipient_ctx.unprotect_request() succeeds (window wasn't poisoned)

This would catch regressions if someone accidentally reverts to check-and-update-before-decrypt.
close_reason: Test coverage suggestion - deferred to future work
